# BP-135 positive: a request handler starts a GORM chain on a package global.
lang: go
file: BP-135-vulnerable.go
variant: gorm-global-http
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

var DB *gorm.DB

type User struct{}

func listUsers(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	var users []User
	DB.Where("active = ?", true).Find(&users)
}
